title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Bagha confides in Daya by telling her the reason for his confused state of mind. Later, Daya updates everyone else.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Just as Natu Kaka returns from his holiday, the ladies of Gokuldham society groom Bagha for his date with Bawri.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Mauji returns Jethalal's money back to Champaklal. Bawri expresses a worry to the residents of Gokuldham Society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Bhide accidentally ruins Jethalal's cheque and has to get a new one from his house. However, the only person left at the house is Tapu.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Jethalal arrives at the hospital angry. Bhide receives a package for Jethalal, but he breaks the merchandise inside by accident.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Bhide fixes the statue and hands it to Sodhi to give to Jethalal. However, the statue breaks again under Sodhi's care.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Iyer breaks the statue while carrying it home and gives it to Taarak. However, Taarak also breaks it before he can give it to Jethalal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: After Jethalal also breaks the statue, Ramesh arrives at his house to pick it up. Daya and Jethalal try their best to fix the statue.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Ramesh opens the box to find the statue intact, much to Jethalal and Daya's relief. The residents come to the Gada household to apologise for breaking the statue.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Jethalal tries to impress Babita with his knowledge about foreign countries, but Daya ends up embarrassing him. Babita implores Iyer to buy a new fridge.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Babita and Iyer select a fridge for their house from Jethalal's shop. Jethalal begins to panic when Nattu Kaka accidentally sells the model to someone else.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Jethalal ends up with multiple pieces of the same refrigerator to please Babita. Iyer refuses to buy a refrigerator from him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Jethalal is irked at Iyer over the refrigerator fiasco. Everyone looks forward to Diwali, and Tapu demands toys and clothes from Jethalal.

title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Itti Si Khushi
desc: Anvita, a young caregiver, shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings. As she navigates her responsibilities and growing attachment to Virat, she's also supported by Sanjay, who harbours unrequited feelings for her.

title: Pushpa Impossible
desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Bawri lies to her parents about Bagha's electronics store ownership, but her deception backfires when her parents express interest in seeing the store.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Bawri's parents are excited to see Bagha's shop, but Bagha becomes scared that they will find out about him not being an employee at the shop any more.

title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Jethalal gets angry with Taarak and Anjali for helping Gulabo. Meanwhile, Gulabo creates differences between Taarak and Anjali, and Taarak tries to find an advocate to fight Jethalal's case.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Taarak and Jethalal visit a couple of advocates but are unable to find the right advocate. Later, Jethalal starts dreaming about the future and gets scared.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Jethalal finds an advocate to fight his case. Gulabo tries to get close to other members of the society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: When Gulabo brings food to the shop, Jethalal is taken aback and must deal with her in front of his clients.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: While the Gadas stand united in this unforeseen crisis, Gulabo is adamant that Jethalal speaks to her at least once.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: The residents are concerned about Gulabo's health since she is adamant on staying out in the cold until Jethalal speaks with her.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: The residents try to convince Jethalal to speak with Gulabo, but he refuses. Finally, Daya convinces him to speak to her.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Jethalal receives the court's notice and approaches Taarak. They meet an advocate who looks confident and assures Jethalal that they will win the case.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Jethalal reaches the court with his family and the advocate. When Gulabo reaches the court, Jethalal's advocate tries to negotiate the matter with her.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Natu Kaka creates a scene outside court as he thinks that Jethalal would lose the case. Daya and Gulabo get into a heated argument.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Unable to bear the advocate Jwala's allegations, Sodhi gets hyper and reacts aggressively. Jwala shoots a series of questions at Daya who then reveals the truth in the court.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: After the lawyer twists her words to fit her narrative in court, Daya gets furious and talks rudely with the advocate, which causes Jethalal in trouble.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Everyone in the society is worried for the Gada family and try to find solutions to help Jethalal. Taarak comes up with a plan and sends a letter to Gulabo.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: With a new plan in mind, Taarak asks Jethalal to hand over Daya's gold jewellery to Gulabo. Daya is surprised to see Jethalal and Gulabo together in a temple.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: As the society members enjoy their time in Singapore, Champakal suddenly becomes afraid of boarding the cruise.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Champaklal finds Popatlal dancing with women on the sixth deck, and Bhide informs everyone about a popular show that will take place on the ship.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Popatlal becomes friendly with two girls and takes photos with them. Everyone receive a stern message from their sponsor.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: After making the residents of Gokuldham run around, their trip sponsor reveals himself. He reveals the reason behind his gesture and gives them some sound advice.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Anjali reminds Taarak of the diet he has to follow after reaching home. Everyone praises Abdul for writing the thought for the day on the board in Iyer's absence.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Popatlal calls Asit and expresses his gratitude for sponsoring the trip to Singapore.Goli gives his father a pleasant surprise.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Babita and Jethalal relive their Singapore trip memories with Iyer. Popatlal begins his day with radiating positivity.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Popatlal spreads his positive energy around Gokuldham Society. Jethalal decides to surprise Bagha and Nattu Kaka, but he is the one who ends up surprised.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Jethalal braces himself when he hears that Daya's brother Sunder is about to visit. On the other hand, an overexcited Daya wakes him up early the next day to get milk for Sunder.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Sunder visits Gokuldham Society, much to the dismay of Jethalal. When Jethalal carries Sundar's luggage to his house, Sundar notices that the bag containing his belongings is missing.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Sunder realises that he left his bag containing his belongings in Ahmedabad. He tells the Gada family about a brand new investment scheme that makes Jethalal sceptical.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Sunder introduces his scheme to the men of Gokuldham Society, who refuse the offer, prompting Daya to try to convince all the ladies to invest in the enterprise.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: The ladies set off to arrange money to invest in Sunder's scheme. Jethalal learns that Babita has agreed to invest in the offer and decides to do the same despite his reservations.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: After investing in Sundarlal's scheme, everyone starts enquiring about their money to Jethalal and Daya.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: When Sunder fails to respond to the society members' calls, Jethalal reluctantly agrees to pay them back. However, Sunder shocks everyone by arriving in the society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Sunder returns everyone's invested money with interest. The ladies meet again to discuss their favourite television serial, but an issue puts a halt to it.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Champaklal and Daya try to convince Tapu and Jethalal to have breakfast. The residents complain about the water problems in Gokuldham.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: The residents try to get Bhide to solve the water problem, but he is busy buying vegetables; Abdul takes it upon himself to fix the problem.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: The residents realise someone is locked inside the building. Potpatlal thinks Bhide is responsible for the water problem.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Daya finds an unconscious woman lying on the terrace of the building and the residents take her to Dr Haathi. Popatlal wants to know if the woman is single.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Bagha rushes in to serve Jethalal tea as he gets down to work. Bagha and Natu Kaka argue in English. The ladies take care of Bharti and get to know her better.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: After hearing Bharti's story, Daya decides to do something about the catcallers. Soon, the ladies of Gokuldham hatch a plan.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Daya and Bharti lead the residents of Gokuldham to confront the catcallers and make them take responsibility for their actions.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: The residents call the police on the catcallers. Soon, they are escorted to their parents, and the residents expose what they have been doing to women.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Seeing his mother's tears, Tapu plots revenge on his father. This family conflict embroils Jethalal in chaos, leaving him worried about Tapu's behaviour.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Jethalal's family suffer multiple setbacks when Champaklal goes missing at the train station. A worried Daya seeks help from the media.

desc: Anvita, a young caregiver, shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings. As she navigates her responsibilities and growing attachment to Virat, she's also supported by Sanjay, who harbours unrequited feelings for her.

title: Pushpa Impossible
desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Bawri and Bagha approach Jethalal with their predicament. Champaklal convinces him to allow Bagha to pretend to own Gada Electronics temporarily.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Jethalal faces a dilemma when his meeting with Dhanraj Seth conflicts with his promise to Bagha. Bawri's parents plan to visit Bagha's shop in the morning.

title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Jethalal suspects Tappu is hiding something from him. Tappu is secretly planning a trip to Goa with his friends.
